allow: Bash(npx tsc --noEmit game-systems/pf2e/data/backgrounds.ts game-systems/pf2e/data/skills.ts game-systems/pf2e/data/feats.ts game-systems/pf2e/data/equipment.ts)

Bash(npx tsx -e "import {ancestries} from ''./game-systems/pf2e/data/ancestries''; import {classes} from ''./game-systems/pf2e/data/classes''; import {feats} from ''./game-systems/pf2e/data/feats''; console.log\(''Ancestries:'', ancestries.map\(a => a.name + '' \('' + a.heritages.length + '' h\)''\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Classes:'', classes.map\(c => c.name\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total feats:'', feats.length\);")
